backend_ast_parse.summary: All backend Python files modified by M012 parse cleanly.

migration_structure.summary: Dedicated override persistence layer exists and is chained from the current Alembic head.

merged_get_contract.summary: GET contract exposes merged global+override days with source annotation.

put_save_and_cache_invalidation.summary: PUT path saves overrides and invalidates the patient override Redis cache namespace.

override_first_lookup.diagnostic: patient_flow_state_id references present; flow_override:{state_id}:days cache key found
override_first_lookup.summary: _get_day_config consults the patient override cache/path before falling back to the global template.

skip_logic.diagnostic: skip handling present in state.py and skipped status present in flow_helpers.py
skip_logic.summary: skip=true overrides are honored in both on-demand and batch pipeline paths.

override_immutability.summary: Patient overrides remain fixed even if the global template changes later.

patient_detail_editor_wiring.summary: PatientDetailPage exposes the override editor entry point.

future_day_restriction.diagnostic: current_flow_day, editable schema field, and disabled UI gating confirmed
future_day_restriction.summary: Only future days are editable in the assembled override flow.

frontend_typecheck.summary: Frontend override types and usage compile cleanly.

frontend_build.summary: Production build stays green with the PatientDetailPage override editor integrated.

accepted_non_blocking_diagnostics: verify-m012.sh is structural/build-based and does not replay live HTTP requests against a running stack; this matches the scoped S04 proof strategy.
